arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rejected players' day off request after Manchester United victory vs Fulham
arts.sum: Man Utd won 1-0 against Fulham in the Premier League at the weekend to give Ruben Amorim an early birthday gift.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim hints at new Manchester United role for Lisandro Martinez and makes Rasmus Hojlund admission
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez did the attacking for Man United on a night their striker Rasmus Hojlund failed to score for the 11th game running.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford theory emerges as Ruben Amorim handed major blow
arts.sum: After Manchester United's 1-0 win over Fulham, Ruben Amorim might be optimistic that his team are starting to adapt to his methods - but he will still be keen to secure a new signing before deadline day

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim can enjoy his birthday knowing the Man United fans are behind him, writes CHRIS WHEELER… unlike Sir Jim Ratcliffe who has a new X-rated chant
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: And here on a soggy night at Craven Cottage was another win to lift his spirits and celebrate his birthday with a smile on his face.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How 'frustrating' Hojland blunted Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given criticise the performance of Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund in his side's 1-0 Premier League win away at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: I would put 63-year-old on bench instead of Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United’s head coach has frozen out forward Amorim says veteran goalkeeping coach a bench option Ruben Amorim said he would rather name his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach as a substitute than Marcus Rashford or any Manchester United player who was not prepared to give “the maximum”. The manager watched his starting centre-forward, Rasmus Højlund, endure a torrid time in the club’s 1-0 win at Fulham on Sunday night; he was forced to replace him with Joshua Zirkzee, who made little impact. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe hounded by irate Man United fans as 'worse than the Glazers' in X-rated rants with anger at owner for ongoing ticket-price hikes after Fulham win
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe was hounded by his own fans as he left Craven Cottage on Sunday night with the Man United minority owner continuing to persevere over his controversial ticket-price hike.

arts.ttl: Fulham assessing Wilson injury after loss to United
arts.sum: Fulham will assess an ankle injury Harry Wilson suffered during their 1-0 loss to Manchester United. Wilson had to be taken off early in the second half of the game at Craven Cottage, where Lisandro Martinez’s fortuitous 78th-minute goal gave United victory. “He twisted his ankle,” said Whites boss Marco Silva. “We have to assess […] The post Fulham assessing Wilson injury after loss to United appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim press conference after Fulham v Man Utd
arts.sum: We need guys with the one-v-one [ability], but like I say I don’t know what’s going to happen until the end of the window." "The reason is the training, the way I see what a footballer should do in training, in life and it’s every day, every detail.

arts.ttl: Fulham defeat by ‘very lucky’ Man Utd is ‘unfair’, says Silva
arts.sum: Marco Silva described Fulham’s defeat as “unfair” after Lisandro Martinez’s fortuitous goal gave Manchester United a 1-0 victory at Craven Cottage. Martinez’s shot struck Fulham midfielder Sasa Lukic and looped over keeper Bernd Leno. It came in the 78th minute and was United’s first effort on target.
